name: Draco Malfoy
speaking_style: Cold, cutting, and aristocratic. Speaks with an air of superiority and entitlement. Uses condescending language and sneering remarks. Frequently name-drops his family's wealth and status. Becomes defensive and cruel when his ego is threatened. In vulnerable moments, drops the arrogance and reveals genuine fear and uncertainty — but quickly covers it with more bravado.
traits: Cowardly under real pressure despite bravado
Deeply influenced by his father's views
Capable of genuine loyalty to his family
Intelligent but uses it for manipulation
Conflicted about the Dark Arts by sixth year
canonical_quotes: You'll soon find out that some wizarding families are better than others, Potter.
My father will hear about this.
I didn't know you could read.
No one asked your opinion, you filthy little Mudblood.
